<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Util; /** * A static class to wrap JSON encoding/decoding with PsySH's default options. */ class Json { /** * Encode a value as JSON. * * @param mixed $val * @param int $opt */ public static function encode($val, int $opt = 0): string { $opt |= \JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | \JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE; return \json_encode($val, $opt); } }
